work_completion_requirement.single_work_80_percent: One similar completed work contract costing not less than Rs. 5.91 Lakh

work_completion_requirement.description_of_similar_work: Work of conducting Oxygen Mapping and any type of flow measurements in more than 100MW capacity thermal power stations.

disqualification_triggers: Conditional tenders.
Not having an active GSTIN registration.
History of being blacklisted, stop-dealt, or banned by GUVNL or its subsidiary companies.
Conflict of interest with other bidders participating in the same tender.

Non-disclosure of a relationship with a GSECL employee where the interest (shareholding) is 10% or more.

Record of poor performance such as abandoning the work, rescinding of contract.

Financial failure due to bankruptcy.

name: Consultancy Services for DPR preparation, land acquisition, utility shifting work for bypass road of Shahera, Dist. Panchamahal.

tender_info.title: Consultancy Services for DPR preparation, land acquisition, utility shifting work for bypass road of Shahera, Dist. Panchamahal.

work_completion_requirement.description_of_similar_work: Experience of preparation of DPR/Feasibility of 2/4/6 lane Highways/Bridges (NH/SH/Equivalent). Required aggregate length of DPR/Feasibility projects equal to the indicative package length (10 km). Must have completed at least one DPR project of min. 4 km (40% of package length) OR one Feasibility Study of min. 6 km (60% of package length). Experience for private concessionaire/contractor will not be considered.

technical_eligibility.specific_equipment_manpower: Firm must possess essential equipment for: Material Testing (Aggregate/Soil), Field Investigation (FWD, Roughometer, DGPS, LiDAR/Drone, GPR), and Office Software (MX/Open Roads, AutoCAD, MIDAS, MS Project, HDM-4).

financial_eligibility.avg_annual_turnover: Equal to or more than Rs. 5.00 Crores from Consultancy Services for the last 5 financial years.

costs_and_deposits.tender_document_fee: Rs. 3600/- (Non-refundable). Exemption available for Micro and Small Enterprises.
costs_and_deposits.security_deposit_percentage: 10% of total contract value as an unconditional Bank Guarantee (Performance Security). To be submitted from a Nationalized Bank, IDBI, ICICI Bank, Foreign Bank, EXIM Bank or any Scheduled Commercial Bank with a net worth of not less than Rs. 1000 crore.

disqualification_triggers: Existing bar/blacklisting by MoRTH or State R&B Department.
Withdrawal of proposal during its validity period.
Failure to sign the contract agreement after being selected.
Submission of false/fake/inflated information in CVs or experience documents.
Failure to provide Performance Security within the stipulated time.
Engagement in corrupt, fraudulent, collusive or coercive practices.

work_completion_requirement.description_of_similar_work: For Thermoplast Paint Work (Item 14), the agency must have experience carrying out similar work. Specific value or duration is not mentioned.
work_completion_requirement.three_works_40_percent: Experience in successfully completing or substantially completing at least one contract of similar works of at least 40 percent of the value of proposed contract within the last five years (As per generic clause 4.5.3(b)).

technical_eligibility.registration_class_required: Sp. Cat-II (Road) with 'A' Class or above with Government of Gujarat, Road & Building Department.
technical_eligibility.specific_equipment_manpower: As per Special Clause XII, only contractors possessing a drum mix plant for mixing bitumen and aggregate are eligible to bid. Bidders must supply necessary proof/document for possession of the required equipment (including vibratory roller and paver finisher as per Special Clause II). The equipment must conform to MORTH specifications (5th Revision), 2013.
technical_eligibility.min_experience_years: Experience in the last five years required.

financial_eligibility.bank_type_stipulation: Tender fee via Demand Draft from any Schedule Bank. Bid Security (EMD) via FDR or Bank Guarantee from a Scheduled Indian Bank.
financial_eligibility.avg_annual_turnover: Rs. 0.00 lacs specified in the appendix, indicating this specific criteria is not applicable and eligibility is primarily based on registration class and solvency.
financial_eligibility.solvency_certificate_value: 20% of estimated cost (approx. Rs. 72.87 Lakhs) for the current calendar year.
financial_eligibility.net_worth_requirement: Access to liquid assets and/or credit facilities up to 25% of the contract value (Rs. 91.09 Lakhs).

costs_and_deposits.security_deposit_percentage: For Thermoplast Paint Work (Item 14), a Guarantee Security Deposit of 10% of the item cost will be retained from R.A. bills.

disqualification_triggers: Conditional tenders shall not be accepted.
Non-submission or late submission of physical instruments (DD/FDR/BG) for Tender Fee and EMD.
Failure to submit all required documents as per clauses 5.1, 5.2 & 5.3.
Failure to respond to negotiation calls (maximum three times) will result in EMD forfeiture and tender rejection.
For non-submission of original EMD instruments, contractor registration may be kept in abeyance for one year and the e-tendering code cancelled for one year.
Misleading or false representation in submitted forms.
Record of poor performance (e.g., abandoning work, rescinding of contract).
Consistent history of litigation awarded against the applicant or financial failure due to bankruptcy.
History of abandoning any work of Government of Gujarat/India or having a contract rescinded in the last five years (as per affidavit).
eligibilityCriteria.translation_notes: The provided document is a Specification Index (Bill of Quantities) and is in English. It does not contain the Tender Notice, General Conditions, or any sections detailing eligibility criteria, costs, or statutory requirements.

work_completion_requirement.description_of_similar_work: The document is a specification index and does not define 'Similar Work' as an eligibility criterion. However, the scope of work includes road resurfacing, strengthening, earthwork, granular sub-base, WBM, BM, SDBC, and installation of sign boards and safety barriers.

technical_eligibility.registration_class_required: Sp. Cat-II (Road) with 'A' Class or above with R&B Department, Government of Gujarat
technical_eligibility.specific_equipment_manpower: Possession of a Drum Mix Plant for mixing bitumen and aggregate is compulsory. Use of Paver Finisher for bituminous work is required. Use of Vibratory Roller is compulsory. All equipment must conform to MORTH specifications (5th Revision), 2013. Bidders must supply necessary proof of possession of the required equipment.

financial_eligibility.avg_annual_turnover: Rs. 0.00 lacs (This is a placeholder value from Appendix). Clause 4.5.3 (a) requires a minimum annual turnover in any one of the last five years, but the specific amount is not defined in the template.
financial_eligibility.solvency_certificate_value: Bank Solvency Certificate of current calendar year for 20% of estimated cost (approx. Rs. 74.86 Lakhs). Additionally, bidder must have access to liquid assets/credit facilities of 25% of contract value (Rs. 93.58 Lakhs).

costs_and_deposits.security_deposit_percentage: A specific retention of 2% of the amount for bituminous items will be withheld until miscellaneous items (like earthwork, side shoulders) are completed. Standard Security Deposit percentage is not mentioned.

disqualification_triggers: Conditional tender submitted
Tender submitted without valid Tender documents, Fees, or Earnest Money Deposit (EMD)
Tender is incomplete in any respect
Failure to submit original DD/FDR/BG for EMD and Tender Fee physically after online submission
Bidder does not respond to requests for negotiation within the validity period
Made misleading or false representation in the forms and statements submitted.
Record of poor performance such as abandoning the work, rescinding of contract, or inordinate delay in completion.
Consistent history of litigation awarded against the applicant.
Financial failure due to bankruptcy.
Participated in the previous bidding for the same work and had quoted unreasonably high bid prices without rational justification.
Extremely poor progress of work may lead to the Engineer accelerating the work through another agency at the original contractor's cost and risk.
